---
name: Bug report
about: Report a math bug, fetch error, or unexpected detector output
title: ''
labels: bug
---

## What happened
A clear description of what you observed.

## What you expected
A clear description of what you expected to see.

## Reproduction
```bash
mvcf analyze --fixture <name>
```

## Environment
- `mvcf --version`:  (e.g., `mvcf 0.4.0`)
- Python:  (e.g., 3.11.7)
- OS:

## Severity
- [ ] Headline metric is materially wrong (would mislead a curator)
- [ ] Crash or parsing error
- [ ] Cosmetic / docs
